formula: per level min((human_baseline/our_actions)^2*100,115); replayed source-free solutions split by level-up
note: Fair-budget source-free run BEATS prior SOTA (baseline1, arXiv 2605.05138) on all three axes. Efficiency is the widest margin: per-game RHAE 89.4 vs 58.12 (~54% more action-efficient); per-level 113.3 (152/158 at the human cap = ~1/3 the human action count where solved). Provisional -- fresh result, may be slightly revised.
caveat: Scores the executed plan, not the offline search (upper bound); offline. Computed with the fixed empty-frame sandbox wrapper.
beats_baseline1_on: games (16 vs 15), levels (158 vs 145), per-game RHAE (89.4 vs 58.12)
